personal.name: Hassan Md. Sharfuddin Miraz
personal.title: DevOps Engineer
personal.tagline: Building Scalable Cloud Infrastructure & Automation Systems
personal.summary: DevOps Engineer with expertise in AWS, CI/CD automation, infrastructure as code (IaC), and containerization. Proficient in deploying, monitoring, and optimizing cloud solutions to enhance scalability, security, and performance. Passionate about automation, reliability engineering, and improving system efficiency through cutting-edge tools and methodologies.

responsibilities: Architected, deployed, and optimized scalable three-tier and microservices-based applications on AWS using containerization, IaC, and CI/CD automation tools.
Engineered and deployed Dockerized and Kubernetes-based applications including a Field Force Management System, improving scalability and deployment speed.
Automated cloud infrastructure provisioning using Terraform and Ansible, reducing human errors and accelerating development cycles.
Developed and streamlined GitLab CI/CD pipelines, integrating ArgoCD and GitOps practices for faster releases and improved code quality.
Managed critical AWS services including VPC, RDS, S3, IAM, ELB, and Auto Scaling ensuring high availability and security.
Implemented observability solutions using Prometheus, Grafana, and EFK stack enabling proactive monitoring and real-time issue resolution.
Delivered scalable solutions in Agile Scrum environments ensuring efficient project execution and seamless cross-functional collaboration.

projects.title: AI Skill Learning Platform (Microservices)
projects.subtitle: Jenkins Multi-Pipeline Orchestration
projects.description: Architected a scalable microservices platform for AI-powered skill development using Docker and Kubernetes. Managed course delivery, user analytics, and personalized learning paths across 15+ services with 99.9% uptime.
projects.achievements: Engineered Jenkins multi-pipeline architecture with shared libraries for 15+ microservices, reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 7 minutes. Automated infrastructure with Terraform across multi-project pipelines, achieving 40% cost optimization.

projects.title: Intelligent Business Communication System
projects.subtitle: Jenkins Multi-Project Serverless
projects.description: Deployed a real-time AI communication platform using AWS Lambda, EKS, and Kafka for message processing. Enabled omnichannel business comms with real-time analytics and ML inference at edge locations.
projects.achievements: Implemented Jenkins multi-project pipeline matrix for serverless deployments across 8 environments, achieving 500ms p99 latency. Centralized observability with shared Jenkins pipeline libraries monitoring 10M+ daily messages.

projects.title: QuickSkill AI Learning Platform
projects.subtitle: Jenkins Multi-Branch GitOps
projects.description: Orchestrated a hybrid AI platform for rapid skill acquisition using Jenkins multi-branch pipelines, ArgoCD, and multi-cloud strategy (AWS/GCP). Delivered zero-downtime blue-green deployments for 50K+ concurrent learners.
projects.achievements: Developed comprehensive Jenkins multi-pipeline strategy with 25+ interconnected projects, reducing infrastructure costs by 35%. Implemented progressive delivery matrix with canary releases across 3 environments, achieving 99.99% success rate.

projects.title: Field Force Management (Microservices)
projects.subtitle: Containerization & Automation
projects.description: Designed and orchestrated a microservices-based Field Force Management application using Docker and Kubernetes. The system manages field agents, tasks, and real-time tracking across distributed services, ensuring high availability, fault tolerance, and seamless scalability in production.
projects.achievements: Automated infrastructure provisioning and configuration with Terraform and Ansible, significantly reducing manual effort and enhancing deployment efficiency. Achieved faster release cycles through GitLab CI/CD pipelines with zero-downtime deployments.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.subtitle: Scalable Cloud Deployment & CI/CD Optimization
projects.description: Designed and deployed a containerized E-commerce platform on AWS using a robust three-tier architecture, ensuring high scalability, resilience, and performance.
projects.achievements: Automated CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time and streamlining release cycles. Integrated proactive monitoring to identify and resolve issues efficiently.

projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline for Microservices
projects.subtitle: Field Force Management Automation
projects.description: Designed and optimized a CI/CD pipeline for the Field Force Management application, automating build, test, and deployment workflows across microservices.
projects.achievements: Implemented GitOps practices with ArgoCD and GitLab CI/CD, ensuring seamless multi-service deployments and accelerating release cycles.

publications.title: Emotion Detection in Bangla Music Lyrics Using Machine and Deep Learning Approaches
